title: galium rotundifolium subsp. hirsutum
intro: Galium rotundifolium subsp. hirsutum, also known as rough-leaved bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the madder family, Galiumaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Galium rotundifolium subsp. hirsutum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system. Galium rotundifolium subsp. hirsutum is traditionally prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and creams for topical application.
